_comment: This controls the 'Pricing' section. Each object inside the 'plans' list becomes one pricing card, in the same order as written here. Never touch index.html — just edit/add/remove plans below.
_comment_fields: name = card title. price = shown big price, keep the ₹ or change the currency symbol. features = list of lines with checkmarks. popular = true shows the 'Most Popular' badge and highlights the card (use it on ONLY one plan). addon = optional small highlighted note under the features (delete the whole addon block on a plan if you don't need it). button = the text/link of the card's button.

addon.note: Need it edited/customized for you? +₹30 extra
